title: Is it possible to set automatically a status to an item based on its location?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I would like ton know if there is an app or a workaround to get a status based on a location (column location), as would work a GIS software with a buffer. 
Thanks 
Guillaume

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like ton know if there is an app or a workaround to get a status based on a location (column location), as would work a GIS software with a buffer.

Thanks
Guillaume

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for your reply but i mean really the Location column like an address and not a dropdown column.

posts.author: jashimonday (Mohammad Chowdhury)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you please share some example values of your location column?

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml: Well this is an address, that can’t be something else with this kind of column

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guillaume,

What exactly are you trying to do? Can you share an example. What value do you expect in the location column and when do you need to change to a particular status?

I can imagine you want to change a status column based on country or city to divide items accross teams if you use a status column for this.

Any extra context certainly helps trying to give a practical answer or solution.

Best,

Maarten
